campaigns.title: Ash Harbor inventory, knowledge, and branch continuity
campaigns.defaultInput: Continue the Ash Harbor investigation without contradicting the active route, inventory ledger, or private vault knowledge.

milestones.input: Edit turn 8 so the party chose the red road, then replay derived state.
Regenerate the last narration while preserving the consumed sunstone and sealed breach.
Branch before Corvin learns the vault secret and continue on the private-knowledge branch.
expected: Corvin does not know the vault secret

milestones.input: Close and reopen the runtime, then continue from SQLite continuity.
Switch from the strong hosted model to the economical hosted model and continue.
expected: model switch adds no state mutation

campaigns.title: Moon Gate lore, relationship-free character consistency, and regeneration
campaigns.defaultInput: Advance the Moon Gate expedition while keeping the oath wording, character motives, and discovered lore consistent.

milestones.input: Edit the oath from silver flame to quiet rain and replay later turns.
expected: old oath is absent from active state

milestones.input: Regenerate the gate opening with different prose but identical state consequences.
expected: discarded variant effects do not leak

milestones.input: Create a branch where Ilya refuses to cross the gate.
expected: Ilya remains outside on this branch

milestones.input: Restart after the branch and verify the selected response variant.
Switch to the local OpenAI-compatible model for the remaining expedition.
expected: call ledger names the local model

campaigns.title: Cinder Court multi-character knowledge and restart durability
campaigns.defaultInput: Continue the Cinder Court intrigue with distinct character voices and strictly scoped secrets.

milestones.input: Edit the private meeting so only Mara, not Ilya, saw the sealed letter.
Regenerate the court response without changing who possesses the sealed letter.
Branch before the accusation and accuse the treasurer instead of the envoy.
Restart twice and verify continuity after each reopen.
expected: SQLite state is identical after each reopen

milestones.input: Switch from local to strong hosted generation for the finale.
